name: Bai Qi

skills.name: Reaper's Revenge
skills.description: Enhance Speed Up Gains Energy when dealing or taking damage, increasing his Movement Speed and enhancing his recovery effects.

skills.name: Blood Echo
skills.description: Damage Recovery Deals damage to nearby enemies and recovers Health. Charging up will boost the skill's effects. '''Passive:''' When taking damage, there is a chance to automatically trigger Skill 1.

skills.name: Deathscythe
skills.description: Crowd Control Damage Enhance Summons a scythe in the target direction, pulling enemies within range while inflicting damage and slow.

skills.name: Lay Waste
skills.description: Crowd Control Damage Enhance Leaps to the target location and taunts enemies while dealing damage and enhancing his recovery effects. Taunt duration increases with Health.

tips: Bai Qi is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.9% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Deftness → Blazing Cape → Cuirass of Savagery → Eye of the Phoenix → Overlord's Platemail → Spikemail.
Run Fate for stats that match Bai Qi's Tank kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Blood Echo → Deathscythe → Lay Waste → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Bai Qi excels into Arke, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Zhuangzi, Ying Zheng without team peel.
Bai Qi sits at Tier B globally (51.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Bai Qi good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Bai Qi is Tier B Tank with 51.9% win rate, 0.4% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Bai Qi build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Deftness, Blazing Cape, Cuirass of Savagery, Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Spikemail. Run Fate arcana with Flash & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Bai Qi?
faqs.answer: Pick Zhuangzi, Ying Zheng into Bai Qi. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Bai Qi completes core items. Bai Qi struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Bai Qi counter?
faqs.answer: Bai Qi is strong into Arke, Garo according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Bai Qi when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Bai Qi good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Bai Qi sits at Tier B globally (51.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Bai Qi play?
faqs.answer: Bai Qi is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Tank). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Bai Qi?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Flash & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Bai Qi or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Bai Qi vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Bai Qi has +0.5% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Bai Qi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Bai Qi?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
